records.ety: [Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ effect of the stars on human destiny, fr. <?/ to complete; <?/ from + <?/ to end, <?/ end.]

defs: Relating to the casting of horoscopes.
Relating to an issue of fulfillment.
quotes: In this way a passage in the Old Testament may have, or rather comprise, an apotelesmatic sense, i. e., one of after or final accomplishment.
